channel.title: LemonKAI
channel.description: Kai Ning 的繁中 Kubernetes infra notebook：以 KAI K8s之路為主線，整理 Pod、Deployment、Service、Probe、GitOps 的心智模型、排查筆記與操作守則。

item.title: GitOps review checklist before Argo CD syncs production
item.description: A compact pre-sync checklist for GitOps changes so an innocent YAML edit does not become surprising production behavior in Kubernetes.

item.title: KAI K8s之路 01 — English mirror: What a Kubernetes Pod is, and why it does not manage containers directly
item.description: Start with the core Kubernetes abstraction: what a Pod actually manages, and why Kubernetes schedules Pods instead of orchestrating containers directly.

item.title: KAI K8s之路 01｜Pod 是什麼？為什麼 Kubernetes 不直接管理 container
item.description: 從 Kubernetes 最核心的抽象開始：Pod 到底在管什麼，為什麼平台不是直接管理單個 container，而是用 Pod 當最小調度單位。

item.title: Kubernetes 探針誤判：一次把服務打進重啟循環的 liveness probe 事故
item.description: 有些事故不是程式壞掉，而是 liveness probe 把本來還能活下來的服務誤判成該重啟。這篇記一個很典型的 production 坑。

item.title: Kubernetes deployment guardrails: probes, rollout settings, and fast triage
item.description: A compact baseline for readiness, liveness, rollout settings, and fast triage before a Kubernetes deployment turns into an outage.

item.title: Agent observability in production: spans, tool events, and failure memory
item.description: Basic logging is not enough for agent systems in production; you need traces, tool-level outcomes, and a short path from failure back to prompt or policy.
